summaryText: Twisted Fusion, Duplicate control, and Shadow Nova stabilization are the wipe gate on the twins.

briefInsights.summary: Twisted Fusion, Duplicate control, and Shadow Nova stabilization are the wipe gate on the twins.
briefInsights.evidence: The twins are mainly a coordination fight around movement, duplicates, and stabilization.
confidenceReasons: The twins encounter is defined by Duplicate control and Twisted Fusion movement.
The reviewed fixtures expect coordination-first language on this boss.
briefInsights.recommendation: Fix beam discipline, duplicate control, and Shadow Nova coverage before changing throughput targets.

briefInsights.summary: Twin Strike needs a clearer assignment plan.
briefInsights.evidence: No explicit tank swap or external plan is defined.
confidenceReasons: No explicit tank assignment plan is saved.
Planned tank owners: Mattank, Cutedwarfxd.
briefInsights.recommendation: Never have same boss for more than 3 strikes

briefInsights.summary: Throughput is below the level needed for a clean progression pull.
briefInsights.evidence: 282K estimated DPS gap across the biggest underperformers.
confidenceReasons: 2 low performers are driving the gap.
282K total estimated DPS is missing from the top offenders.
The throughput pressure is most relevant in Phase 2: Dark Synchronization.
briefInsights.recommendation: Review uptime, potion usage, and burst alignment before the next pull.

playerCoaching.recommendation: Move earlier, keep casting lanes cleaner, and stop losing uptime to late reactions.

phaseSuccessCriteria.summary: Phase 1: Twin Assault is close, but still leaks execution.
phaseSuccessCriteria.evidence: Deaths: 1, avoidable: 0, raid-CD gaps: 0. Key mechanics in this phase: Twin Strike, Void Link, Shadow Nova (Vaelgor).

phaseSuccessCriteria.summary: Phase 2: Dark Synchronization is failing on duplicate control or beam movement.
phaseSuccessCriteria.evidence: Key checks: Twin Strike, Twisted Fusion, Duplicate, Shadow Nova (Vaelgor). Deaths 24, avoidable 8.

causeChains: Twisted Fusion or duplicate control slipped -> Shadow Nova pressure spiked -> the synchronized phase collapsed.

Twin Strike assignment slipped in Phase 2: Dark Synchronization. -> Boxiebrown died to Gloom at 1:09. -> 9 chain death(s) followed before the raid stabilized. -> Phase 2: Dark Synchronization stayed not ready, so the pull converted into a wipe there.

phaseReadiness.summary: Phase 1: Twin Assault is close, but still leaks execution.
phaseReadiness.blocker: The raid still needs more stable output here.

phaseReadiness.summary: Phase 2: Dark Synchronization is failing on duplicate control or beam movement.
phaseReadiness.blocker: The synchronized phase is still breaking on movement and coordination.

biggestBlocker.summary: Phase 2: Dark Synchronization is not ready yet.
biggestBlocker.reason: The synchronized phase is still breaking on movement and coordination.

mostLikelyNextWipe.summary: Twin Strike is the most likely repeat wipe point.

deathCascade.recommendation: Boxiebrown died to Gloom. Review positioning and timing

causeChains: Twisted Fusion or duplicate control slipped -> Shadow Nova pressure spiked -> the synchronized phase collapsed.

Twin Strike assignment slipped in Phase 2: Dark Synchronization. -> Boxiebrown died to Gloom at 1:09. -> 9 chain death(s) followed before the raid stabilized. -> Phase 2: Dark Synchronization stayed not ready, so the pull converted into a wipe there.
